requirement_topic.en: CREG Regulatory Framework and Sonelgaz Grid-Connection Requirements

summary.en: Algeria's electricity and gas sector is regulated by CREG (Commission de Régulation de l'Electricité et du Gaz), established under Law 02-01 on electricity and gas distribution. Sonelgaz (Société Nationale de l'Electricité et du Gaz) is the incumbent utility and distribution network operator; OS (Opérateur du Système) manages the national transmission grid and grid codes, with GRTE (Gestionnaire du Réseau de Transport de l'Electricité) responsible for the transmission network. Grid-connected PV inverters must comply with Sonelgaz technical connection specifications covering voltage and frequency ride-through, reactive-power management, anti-islanding protection, reconnection delay, power-quality requirements, and metering. Large-scale solar projects must obtain a generation licence from CREG. Algeria's Loi 04-09 (relative à la promotion des énergies renouvelables dans le cadre du développement durable) and subsequent decrees establish the legal basis for renewable energy generation and grid access.
summary.zh: 阿尔及利亚电力和天然气行业由CREG（电力和天然气监管委员会）依据第02-01号电力和天然气分配法进行监管。Sonelgaz（国家电力和天然气公司）是主要公用事业及配电网运营商；OS（系统运营商）管理全国输电网和电网规范，GRTE（输电网管理机构）负责输电网络。并网光伏逆变器须符合Sonelgaz并网技术规格，涵盖：电压和频率穿越、无功功率管理、防孤岛保护、重连延时、电能质量要求和计量。大型太阳能项目须取得CREG发电许可证。阿尔及利亚第04-09号法（关于在可持续发展框架内促进可再生能源）及后续法令确立了可再生能源发电和电网接入的法律基础。
summary.zht: 阿爾及利亞電力和天然氣行業由CREG（電力和天然氣監管委員會）依據第02-01號電力和天然氣分配法進行監管。Sonelgaz（國家電力和天然氣公司）是主要公用事業及配電網營運商；OS（系統營運商）管理全國輸電網和電網規範，GRTE（輸電網管理機構）負責輸電網絡。併網光伏逆變器須符合Sonelgaz併網技術規格，涵蓋：電壓和頻率穿越、無功功率管理、防孤島保護、重連延時、電能質量要求和計量。大型太陽能項目須取得CREG發電許可證。阿爾及利亞第04-09號法（關於在可持續發展框架內促進再生能源）及後續法令確立了再生能源發電和電網接入的法律基礎。

standards_or_laws: Loi 02-01 relative à l'électricité et à la distribution du gaz par canalisations (electricity and gas distribution law)
Loi 04-09 relative à la promotion des énergies renouvelables dans le cadre du développement durable
Décrets exécutifs implementing Loi 04-09 (renewable energy production, grid access)
Sonelgaz technical grid-connection specifications for distributed and utility-scale PV generation
OS / GRTE grid code for the Algerian transmission system

summary.en: China grid-connection evidence for PV inverters commonly cites GB/T 19964-2024 (technical requirements for PV power stations connecting to power systems) and GB/T 37408-2021. These standards address similar technical areas but are written for the Chinese 50 Hz grid and regulatory framework; they are not acceptable as Sonelgaz grid-connection documentation or CREG project-approval evidence for Algeria.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常引用GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术要求）和GB/T 37408-2021。这些标准涵盖类似技术领域，但针对中国50 Hz电网和监管框架编写，不能作为阿尔及利亚Sonelgaz并网文件或CREG项目批准证据接受。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常引用GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術要求）和GB/T 37408-2021。這些標準涵蓋類似技術領域，但針對中國50 Hz電網和監管框架編寫，不能作為阿爾及利亞Sonelgaz併網文件或CREG項目批准證據接受。

gap.en: Prepare an Algeria-specific Sonelgaz grid settings sheet covering: voltage and frequency ride-through windows for the 50 Hz Algerian grid (230 V single phase / 400 V three phase), reactive-power Q(U) and Q(P) behaviour, anti-islanding method, reconnection delay, active-power curtailment interface, protection relay settings, metering point, and power-quality compliance. Obtain a generation licence from CREG before construction for projects above the distributed-generation threshold. Confirm Loi 04-09 registration and authorisation requirements with CREG and the Ministry of Energy for the applicable capacity tier.
gap.zh: 应准备阿尔及利亚特定的Sonelgaz并网设置表，涵盖：阿尔及利亚50 Hz电网（230 V单相/400 V三相）的电压和频率穿越窗口、无功Q(U)和Q(P)行为、防孤岛方法、重连延时、有功限发接口、保护继电器设置、计量点和电能质量合规。超过分布式发电门槛的项目须在施工前取得CREG发电许可证。应与CREG及能源部确认适用容量层级的第04-09号法登记和授权要求。
gap.zht: 應準備阿爾及利亞特定的Sonelgaz併網設定表，涵蓋：阿爾及利亞50 Hz電網（230 V單相/400 V三相）的電壓和頻率穿越窗口、無功Q(U)和Q(P)行為、防孤島方法、重連延時、有功限發介面、保護繼電器設定、計量點和電能質量合規。超過分布式發電門檻的項目須在施工前取得CREG發電許可證。應與CREG及能源部確認適用容量層級的第04-09號法登記和授權要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected PV inverters under Sonelgaz technical rules; CREG generation licence is mandatory for utility-scale projects under Loi 02-01 and Loi 04-09
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese grid-connected PV projects under CNCA and NB/T 32004; not transferable as Sonelgaz grid approval

source.publisher: Commission de Régulation de l'Electricité et du Gaz (CREG), Algeria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 19964-2024 grid documentation does not satisfy Sonelgaz grid-connection approval or CREG licensing requirements. Prepare Algeria-specific Sonelgaz settings and obtain the required CREG generation licence before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 19964-2024并网文件不满足Sonelgaz并网批准或CREG许可要求。应在调试前准备阿尔及利亚特定的Sonelgaz设置表并取得CREG发电许可证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 19964-2024併網文件不滿足Sonelgaz併網批准或CREG許可要求。應在調試前準備阿爾及利亞特定的Sonelgaz設定表並取得CREG發電許可證。

requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Frequency and Voltage Settings for Algeria
requirement_topic.zh: 阿尔及利亚50 Hz电网频率与电压设置
requirement_topic.zht: 阿爾及利亞50 Hz電網頻率與電壓設定

summary.en: Algeria operates a 50 Hz grid with low-voltage nominal voltage of 230 V (single phase) and 400 V (three phase). The Algerian grid is synchronised with the Maghreb regional interconnection (COMELEC / RAEC / ELTAM) covering Morocco, Algeria, Tunisia, and Libya, which connects to the European ENTSO-E synchronous area via links to Spain and Italy. Inverters must be configured for 50 Hz operation with frequency ride-through, trip thresholds, reconnection delay, and reactive-power behaviour following Sonelgaz / OS technical rules and IEC practice. Chinese GB/T firmware defaults calibrated for the Chinese 50 Hz grid may differ in frequency and voltage tolerance bands from Sonelgaz requirements.
summary.zh: 阿尔及利亚采用50 Hz电网，低压标称电压为230 V（单相）/400 V（三相）。阿尔及利亚电网与马格里布区域互联（COMELEC / RAEC / ELTAM，覆盖摩洛哥、阿尔及利亚、突尼斯和利比亚）同步，并通过与西班牙和意大利的连接接入欧洲ENTSO-E同步区。逆变器必须配置为50 Hz运行，频率穿越、跳闸阈值、重连延时和无功行为应遵循Sonelgaz/OS技术规则及IEC实践。针对中国50 Hz电网校准的GB/T固件默认值在频率和电压容差带上可能与Sonelgaz要求不同。
summary.zht: 阿爾及利亞採用50 Hz電網，低壓標稱電壓為230 V（單相）/400 V（三相）。阿爾及利亞電網與馬格里布區域互聯（COMELEC / RAEC / ELTAM，覆蓋摩洛哥、阿爾及利亞、突尼斯和利比亞）同步，並通過與西班牙和意大利的連接接入歐洲ENTSO-E同步區。逆變器必須配置為50 Hz運行，頻率穿越、跳閘閾值、重連延時和無功行為應遵循Sonelgaz/OS技術規則及IEC實踐。針對中國50 Hz電網校準的GB/T韌體默認值在頻率和電壓容差帶上可能與Sonelgaz要求不同。

standards_or_laws: Sonelgaz / OS technical grid-connection specifications for distributed and utility-scale PV
IEC 61727 (PV systems — characteristics of the utility interface)
IEC 62116 (utility-interconnected PV inverters — test procedure for islanding prevention measures)
ENTSO-E / Maghreb COMELEC regional grid code — relevant for larger plants

summary.en: Chinese PV inverters default to settings under GB/T 37408-2021 and GB/T 19964-2024 for the Chinese 50 Hz grid. While the nominal frequency matches Algeria, trip windows, reconnection sequences, reactive-power curve shapes, and active-power response ramps may differ from Sonelgaz or IEC expectations. Chinese inverters typically support multi-market grid profiles; firmware parameter adjustment for the Algeria market is necessary.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器默认按GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024针对中国50 Hz电网设置。虽然标称频率与阿尔及利亚相同，但跳闸窗口、重连顺序、无功曲线形状和有功响应斜率可能与Sonelgaz或IEC要求不同。中国逆变器通常支持多市场电网配置；需要针对阿尔及利亚市场调整固件参数。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器默認按GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024針對中國50 Hz電網設定。雖然標稱頻率與阿爾及利亞相同，但跳閘窗口、重連順序、無功曲線形狀和有功響應斜率可能與Sonelgaz或IEC要求不同。中國逆變器通常支持多市場電網配置；需要針對阿爾及利亞市場調整韌體參數。

gap.en: Confirm that the inverter model supports an Algeria / Maghreb 50 Hz grid profile. Provide Sonelgaz or the project engineer with a firmware settings sheet showing voltage and frequency trip thresholds, reconnection delay, reactive-power curve, and any active-power reduction ramp. Do not ship with factory-default China-only settings without verification against Sonelgaz grid requirements.
gap.zh: 确认逆变器型号支持阿尔及利亚/马格里布50 Hz电网配置文件。向Sonelgaz或项目工程师提供固件设置表，显示电压和频率跳闸阈值、重连延时、无功曲线和有功降功率斜率。出货前应核验Sonelgaz电网要求，不得以仅适用中国的出厂默认设置出货。
gap.zht: 確認逆變器型號支持阿爾及利亞／馬格里布50 Hz電網配置文件。向Sonelgaz或項目工程師提供韌體設定表，顯示電壓和頻率跳閘閾值、重連延時、無功曲線和有功降功率斜率。出貨前應核驗Sonelgaz電網要求，不得以僅適用中國的出廠默認設定出貨。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory parameter compliance for grid connection under Sonelgaz / OS technical rules; firmware settings are a project-commissioning requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese grid-connection inspection and acceptance; China settings are not directly transferable to Algeria

source.publisher: Sonelgaz (Société Nationale de l'Electricité et du Gaz), Algeria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] 50 Hz frequency is shared between China and Algeria, but grid parameter windows differ. Provide a Sonelgaz-compatible settings sheet and confirm inverter firmware supports the Algerian grid profile before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国和阿尔及利亚均为50 Hz，但电网参数窗口有差异。应提供与Sonelgaz兼容的设置表，并在调试前确认逆变器固件支持阿尔及利亚电网配置文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國和阿爾及利亞均為50 Hz，但電網參數窗口有差異。應提供與Sonelgaz兼容的設定表，並在調試前確認逆變器韌體支持阿爾及利亞電網配置文件。
